summary: Mexican food website (quesadilla menu) with image and header customization in progress.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- A lightly cooked pale-golden cheese quesadilla cut in half with no steam, served on a rustic plate with small side portions of fresh green cilantro, thinly sliced white onions, a small bowl of red salsa, and a dollop of sour cream arranged beside it on a warm wooden surface (quesadilla-cheese-sides.dim_800x600.png)

existing_features.title: Replace the quesadilla menu card image (located at the card identified by XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[2]/div[1]/div[3]/article[4]/div[1]/div[1]) with a newly generated image showing: a lightly cooked (not fully browned), cheese-only quesadilla with no steam rising from it, plated alongside small side portions of fresh cilantro, sliced white onions, salsa, and sour cream displayed beside the quesadilla to indicate they are available as accompaniments.

Add a short, creative, catchy Mexican food phrase or slogan inside the site header (Header.tsx) to make it feel less bland — for example a witty or bold statement celebrating Mexican cuisine. The phrase should be styled to complement the existing header design without disrupting navigation or layout.

new_feature_requests.summary: Update quesadilla image: no steam, less cooked appearance, cheese-only filling, with cilantro, sliced onions, salsa, and sour cream shown on the side
Add a creative/catchy Mexican food phrase to the header to make it less bland
